title: arnica montana var. angustifolia
intro: Arnica montana var. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved arnica, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of this plant are primarily due to its sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of arnica montana var. angustifolia include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, making it a popular natural remedy for bruises, sprains, and other injuries. Herbal preparations of this plant include topical creams, ointments, and gels that can be applied directly to the affected area to promote healing and reduce discomfort.
